detail.description: Joey Loperfido singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Brice Matthews scores. Cam Smith to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido singles on a line drive to center fielder Petey Halpin.
Joey Loperfido doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daniel Schneemann. Cam Smith to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido doubles (6) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Matt Vierling.
Joey Loperfido singles on a fly ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Yordan Alvarez scores. Christian Walker to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Beck, deflected by second baseman Willi Castro. Christian Walker scores. Cam Smith to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Brenton Doyle.
Joey Loperfido singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Carlos Correa scores. Christian Walker to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jorge Soler.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Jake Meyers to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to shortstop J.P. Crawford.
Joey Loperfido singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Carlos Correa to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido doubles (4) on a ground ball to right fielder Luke Raley. Carlos Correa to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to center fielder Denzel Clarke. Christian Walker scores.
Joey Loperfido hits a ground-rule double (3) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Carlos Correa scores. Christian Walker to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Denzel Clarke. Christian Walker to 3rd.
Joey Loperfido triples (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Joey Loperfido homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez scores.
Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Christian Walker to 3rd.
